nasb.text: ‘Now hear this, O foolish and senseless people, Who have eyes but do not see; Who have ears but do not hear.

esv.text: “Hear this, O foolish and senseless people, who have eyes, but see not, who have ears, but hear not.

cnv.text: “愚昧無知的民哪！ 你們有眼不能看， 有耳不能聽； 你們應當聽這話：

ccb.text: ‘听着，你们这群愚昧无知的人啊， 你们视而不见， 听而不闻。
